name: signingChangePassphrase
title: Change Passphrase (Signing Service)
description: Changes the passphrase for a key stored in the peer's signing service. Re-encrypts the key with the new passphrase. Requires authentication. This is an elevated operation — on first call (without confirmToken), returns a confirmation URL that the user must visit in a browser to approve. After approval, retry with the confirmToken to complete the change. Part of the signing service: see also signingServiceInfo, signingCreateKey, signingListKeys, signingSign, signingGetJWT, signingImportKey, signingExportKey, signingDeleteKey.

publicKey.description: Public key identifying which key to re-encrypt (hex string)

confirmToken.description: Confirmation token from browser approval (omit on first call)

updated.description: true if the passphrase was successfully changed

status.description: confirmation_required when user approval is needed

confirmUrl.description: URL for user to visit and approve the operation

confirmToken.description: Token to include when retrying after approval
